707316.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
707316.transcript: We didn't come all this way to lose to you!

1601963.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
1601963.transcript: Right! Never let a chance go to waste!

2102212.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
2102212.transcript: It's like you read my mind!

2646762.label: PL2600_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
2646762.transcript: Told you! Embra and I can't be beat!

7284433.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
7284433.transcript: This chill's giving god awful vibes!

9132098.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
9132098.transcript: Okay, I'ma slice up each and every one of 'em!

25048887.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
25048887.transcript: I bet punching you is like punching a brick wall!

29684492.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
29684492.transcript: Got any plans after this, Zeta?

39932362.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
39932362.transcript: Roses look so good on you, Rosetta!

42809109.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
42809109.transcript: Looks like some sorta souped-up Eidolon, but meaner!

51057881.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
51057881.transcript: Whew! I thought I was dead back there!

57800856.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1600
57800856.transcript: Was going for a clutch win!

61428527.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
61428527.transcript: Holy shit! That's such a cool line!

72499664.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1600_3
72499664.transcript: He's still in the fight, Zeta!

74917349.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0000
74917349.transcript: When I go hard, I go hard!

76015839.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
76015839.transcript: Leave the finishing touches to me!

79304171.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
79304171.transcript: As if you had to ask!

80991077.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1600
80991077.transcript: That worked so much better in my head.

100929174.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
100929174.transcript: Embrask is unstoppable in my hands!

101169206.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
101169206.transcript: Bring it on! I've beaten bad luck a million times!

107561969.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_2
107561969.transcript: Oh, you're gonna pay for that!

108505338.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
108505338.transcript: If I wanna slice as fast as Yodarha, Embra's gotta lose weight!

109833458.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
109833458.transcript: Don't mention it. It's what I do.

119392922.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
119392922.transcript: Ugh. That kinda sucked on my part.

125639077.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
125639077.transcript: Why do I feel like we bit off way too much?

133960023.label: PL2600_vo_DMG_down_3
133960023.transcript: You've just made a huge mistake!

135956262.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
135956262.transcript: Feeling lucky? Just try and stop us!

138075348.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
138075348.transcript: It's not like I can't follow directions.

141856551.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_buff_A_PL2700
141856551.transcript: So you're not just a grump!

144263477.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
144263477.transcript: Hey! Hey! Can I ask you about your lizard form?

145843072.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
145843072.transcript: When we get back, I need a sugar boost!

149524661.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
149524661.transcript: Embrask is my partner, but... uh... is there a non-creepy way to explain this?

151258335.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
151258335.transcript: Why would you go this far!

156743444.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
156743444.transcript: Let's get that catalyst and bail!

156945510.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
156945510.transcript: This time your luck's run out!

165398371.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
165398371.transcript: Don't mind if I test that theory!

166133492.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
166133492.transcript: I can do this all day!

168067314.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
168067314.transcript: Let's see how long you can keep that up!

172894676.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
172894676.transcript: Holy shit! I feel kinda bad for our enemies!

179394908.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
179394908.transcript: Nah, that's how I roll. I'm used to it.

186074392.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
186074392.transcript: Can't I get a little appreciation for my handiwork first?

187120208.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL1700_2
187120208.transcript: Think those augments are still under warranty?

187594171.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
187594171.transcript: Nothing in this world can stop us!

189434025.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
189434025.transcript: Come on, Ed! You gotta be smarter than this!

196856486.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
196856486.transcript: Don't sweat it! Death follows me!

198041589.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
198041589.transcript: Ugh! I've had it with you!

201554490.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
201554490.transcript: Lilith! Time we put a stop to your bullshit!

204318536.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL2700_3
204318536.transcript: I'm back and badder than ever!

205643247.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
205643247.transcript: I don't care how big you are! I'm taking you down!

221082879.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1700_3
221082879.transcript: You're not down and out, are ya?

239508394.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
239508394.transcript: Heck yeah! That got me pumped!

254918548.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
254918548.transcript: Honest opinion time. How's my swordplay?

263580428.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
263580428.transcript: Astral's got nothing on me. No offense.

272665637.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
272665637.transcript: Didn't see that comin', did ya?

272802092.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
272802092.transcript: You sure got guts taking on a whole crew!

276704886.label: PL2600_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
276704886.transcript: Just shows they were no match for us!

278545300.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
278545300.transcript: Did you see what I did? Did ya? Did ya?

288811915.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_1_FIRST
288811915.transcript: What? But I'm sure I hit him!

293877542.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
293877542.transcript: I need my own pair of crushing fists!

298793914.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
298793914.transcript: Man, where do you keep all those swords?

299176578.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
299176578.transcript: Did we nail that or what!

300077825.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
300077825.transcript: Can't this bozo see we're in a hurry?

300978641.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
300978641.transcript: I don't get half the credit I deserve.

321298827.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
321298827.transcript: I won't give up on you! Not now! Not ever!

323163799.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
323163799.transcript: Time to pay the piper, Lilith!

335902056.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
335902056.transcript: You guys aren't just talk, huh?

342312177.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
342312177.transcript: We won't! Me and Embra'sk fight for what's right!

346590239.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
346590239.transcript: This is it! Everything rides on this fight!

363032879.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
363032879.transcript: Sure thing! Wait, does that mean I'm in? Am I in a turtle?

365082275.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
365082275.transcript: There's no way in hell I'll lose!

369264446.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
369264446.transcript: Yeah! You gotta lean into it!

371605722.label: PL2600_vo_DMG_bind_stay_3
371605722.transcript: Get off of me! Damn it!

379356881.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL1700
379356881.transcript: Alright, big guy! Up you go!

380687102.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
380687102.transcript: Thanks! I... Wait, what was that first part?

392619248.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
392619248.transcript: You did great out there, Embraesk!

398536383.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
398536383.transcript: Really? Okay, I'll go all out on the next one!

404341080.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
404341080.transcript: Huh? Hey, you hear about that new bakery in Folca?

407863387.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
407863387.transcript: You're the best swordsman in the world... but for how long?

412800017.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
412800017.transcript: Holy crap! Is he asking me? What do I say? What do I say?

415075864.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
415075864.transcript: Man, I need my own cool catchphrase!

419848867.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
419848867.transcript: It's all rock! Does it even feel pain?

422648940.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
422648940.transcript: Bam! That last attack was all thanks to me!

426748118.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
426748118.transcript: Give up the catalyst, punk! I know you've got it!

427991408.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
427991408.transcript: Everyone in the crew's worth their salt!

432637319.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
432637319.transcript: Aw, you worry too much. I got this.

433568516.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL1700_3
433568516.transcript: Yeah. Not gonna do that again.

443679638.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
443679638.transcript: You can hear me, right? Say something, Ein!

444650327.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
444650327.transcript: Screw the odds! We can do anything!

445973661.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
445973661.transcript: Compared to an automaton, this is easy as pie!

457832778.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_buff_F_PL1600
457832778.transcript: Thanks! But I'm taking the credit!

458067910.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
458067910.transcript: Don't know about that, but I always try my best!

459610466.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
459610466.transcript: It's gotten me out of tons of jams in the past.

463204772.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
463204772.transcript: Sure! Don't be afraid to give me a holler!

468247661.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
468247661.transcript: I eat primal beasts for breakfast!

469774358.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
469774358.transcript: Yeah! It's like the best partner ever!

473000955.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
473000955.transcript: See how I pulled my weight!

475405961.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
475405961.transcript: Yeah! Serve them exactly what they deserved! Humble pie!

487299097.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
487299097.transcript: I'll take you all out at once!

488703117.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
488703117.transcript: This little guy and I make a perfect pair!

494707726.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
494707726.transcript: When it comes to battle, you gotta play for keeps!

495611781.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
495611781.transcript: The way you fight, Id, like diving straight off a cliff... reminds me of me!

496629973.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
496629973.transcript: When the going gets tough, the tough eat fate and shit fury!

501872259.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
501872259.transcript: Bring it on! I could take every punch you throw! Just watch!

504574273.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
504574273.transcript: Sounds boring! I'm in it to win it!

512166333.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
512166333.transcript: I won't give him anything but grief!

518509847.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
518509847.transcript: Yep, I'm the worst quitter you'll ever meet!

518889026.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
518889026.transcript: Uh, don't you mean super great?

519287646.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2700_1
519287646.transcript: Yikes! You're still in one piece!

524501914.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_PL1700_2
524501914.transcript: It's no time for a nap!

530569425.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
530569425.transcript: Get knocked out by two knockouts!

531408924.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
531408924.transcript: Glad your magic's on our side!

535714789.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
535714789.transcript: Man, if I were a dragon slayer, I could do that too!

547504968.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
547504968.transcript: Whoever they are, I want first dibs!

549312745.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
549312745.transcript: Um, Embra's like, no way, man!

553872828.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
553872828.transcript: I've got my eye on you, Maglielle!

569301622.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
569301622.transcript: Yawn? Send me a real challenge!

589221552.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_2chain
589221552.transcript: Right! There's more where that came from!

590941154.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
590941154.transcript: No! Hit it where it hurts!

592756619.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL2700_3
592756619.transcript: Man, you make that look easy!

594031411.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
594031411.transcript: Woo! Whatcha think of my cuts?

598738798.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
598738798.transcript: Ice, huh? I got that on lockdown!

599643471.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
599643471.transcript: Race you to the next fight!

612252641.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
612252641.transcript: What? You can go even faster?

613272921.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
613272921.transcript: I call dibs on the next baddie!

614312196.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
614312196.transcript: Say the word and I'll bail you out!

618654024.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_enemy_break_reaction_A
618654024.transcript: Ha! Now who has the last laugh?

619856972.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
619856972.transcript: Feels better knowing I got sniper support.

619997225.label: PL2600_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
619997225.transcript: Score one more for the team!

624655806.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
624655806.transcript: I got a sword with your name on it!

631364594.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
631364594.transcript: Man, holy knights are so cool!

634794529.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
634794529.transcript: When it comes to sword stuff, I'm your gal!

657130958.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
657130958.transcript: I'll knock all your swords out of the sky! Just watch me!

666301308.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
666301308.transcript: Fire away, Eustace! I'll be fine!

669407931.label: PL2600_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
669407931.transcript: Alright! I'm ending this here and now!

671176120.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
671176120.transcript: Dual wielding's like the coolest thing ever!

681497077.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_2
681497077.transcript: Don't need to tell me twice!

681665261.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
681665261.transcript: I've still got more in me!

686447853.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
686447853.transcript: Ooh, so how many donuts do I get?

692399748.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
692399748.transcript: Time to bring home the bacon!

708039437.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
708039437.transcript: She's so cool! What's her secret?

711853095.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
711853095.transcript: Alright! Embraesk still does the job!

711963926.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
711963926.transcript: And don't let up for nothing!

716071440.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
716071440.transcript: I'd hate to get on his bad side.

719467233.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
719467233.transcript: There's more to me than meets the eye!

739558655.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
739558655.transcript: Yep! When the going gets tough, I cut the tough wide open!

742036731.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
742036731.transcript: Yuck! What's with this creepy ass place?

743767556.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
743767556.transcript: Huh? Why am I in trouble?

747833422.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
747833422.transcript: Yep! I always go out with a bang!

748206031.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1700_2
748206031.transcript: Whoa! That one had to hurt!

748568379.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
748568379.transcript: Think any other duo can top us?

749183681.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
749183681.transcript: We'll stop you if it's the last thing we do!

749833418.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
749833418.transcript: Sheesh! You been hitting the gym or somethin'?

750342923.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
750342923.transcript: Holy crap! My homemade rice ball gave you that much oomph? Do you want seconds?

754946534.label: PL2600_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
754946534.transcript: Hah! What? Was that supposed to be hard?

755856812.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
755856812.transcript: Hah! As if I'd let Galloanza steal my kill!

759260189.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
759260189.transcript: Id, after this is over, we're gonna have a little chat!

767157847.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL1700_2
767157847.transcript: Time to lay the smackdown! And I'll help!

771295193.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
771295193.transcript: Looks like we'll just have to do this slow and steady!

789831393.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
789831393.transcript: So hot! I'm gonna shrivel up!

790072767.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
790072767.transcript: All my daily practice has paid off!

798438002.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
798438002.transcript: Shrug it off, B! Just a scratch!

801421342.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
801421342.transcript: Still hard to believe I'm talking to an astral!

803772720.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_2
803772720.transcript: Alright, just let me focus up!

807538739.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
807538739.transcript: Okay, let's turn up the heat!

808253222.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
808253222.transcript: You know I got your back.

809243738.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
809243738.transcript: Oh yeah, that one felt good!

810000323.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
810000323.transcript: No fair! You can make your swords whoosh around!

810247236.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
810247236.transcript: I'm always down to kick more ass!

816407734.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
816407734.transcript: I'll follow you through hell or high water.

817961812.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
817961812.transcript: Oh yeah! We've got the upper hand!

821471144.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
821471144.transcript: I'm gonna wipe that smirk off your face!

824468608.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
824468608.transcript: I've worked with Eustace long enough to pick up a few things.

826879734.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
826879734.transcript: We've got him on the ropes!

826972545.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
826972545.transcript: Bring it on! Anytime, any day!

828578561.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL2700_3
828578561.transcript: Oh, come on! Everybody gets one, right?

836564496.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2700_3
836564496.transcript: I told you not to get too close!

838254791.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
838254791.transcript: He's giving some seriously bad vibes!

850031014.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
850031014.transcript: We're headed to the monastery, right? Let's go!

851374337.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1700_3
851374337.transcript: Alright! Who wants a piece of me!

852450562.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
852450562.transcript: Let's finish this, so I can try your newest latte!

863158161.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
863158161.transcript: Whew! I make this look easy!

865738197.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
865738197.transcript: Let's be extra careful just in case.

868785406.label: PL2600_vo_MOV_wait_cold_2
868785406.transcript: Okay, I've had it with this cold!

872202509.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
872202509.transcript: Embrascan and I still have way more to show off!

886520867.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
886520867.transcript: After this fight is over, I'm baking cookies!

887630709.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
887630709.transcript: There's more where that came from!

889080867.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
889080867.transcript: Hey! You wreck everyone's home like this?

891591872.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
891591872.transcript: Gonna take more than a breeze to knock us down!

895758664.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
895758664.transcript: All hail the dynamic duo! A dying blue and crimson spear!

898927953.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
898927953.transcript: Let's trash it and move on!

900862056.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
900862056.transcript: Me and Embra'sk were born ready!

903118339.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
903118339.transcript: I'm better than Gagazet any day!

905020897.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
905020897.transcript: Now's my chance to fix my rep!

910707132.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
910707132.transcript: Uh-oh. We got a mini Ilsa on our hands.

911719904.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
911719904.transcript: Heh heh! All in a day's work!

914703415.label: PL2600_vo_ATK_upper_l_finish_5
914703415.transcript: We'll end this at any cost!

915341427.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
915341427.transcript: Yep! The secret is... uh... don't die!

926053623.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
926053623.transcript: Sorry, Ed, but you're going down!

927310770.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
927310770.transcript: With my guardian angel behind me, it's time to rampage!

928985694.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0000
928985694.transcript: That was freakin' awesome! Got me all fired up!

935739656.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
935739656.transcript: We'll just have to see who's got more guts!

944676534.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
944676534.transcript: Who programmed this thing? It moves so dumb!

946705818.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
946705818.transcript: Jeez! You came out of nowhere!

947884576.label: PL2600_vo_SP_charge_name_3
947884576.transcript: Even if it takes everything I've got!

953481004.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_3
953481004.transcript: Bet I could do that too!

958456626.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
958456626.transcript: I had a feeling you'd notice!

968926481.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
968926481.transcript: You gotta be bold to fight beside heroes!

977875781.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
977875781.transcript: Who designed your armor? An abstract painter?

978303521.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
978303521.transcript: Hehehe, what did I tell ya?

985851522.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
985851522.transcript: Come on, Ambrosk! You can do it!

986536564.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
986536564.transcript: Now they choose to go all out!

988712989.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
988712989.transcript: Hey! Castle visiting hours are over!

990048327.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
990048327.transcript: Got him! Thanks for the support, Narmaya!

991640603.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
991640603.transcript: Yep! The harder I fall, the harder I hit back!

993327708.label: PL2600_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
993327708.transcript: Hah! Another day of kicking ass!

995623129.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
995623129.transcript: Can't you just say good job like a normal person?

995644952.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
995644952.transcript: Nah, you did most of the work!

999864553.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL2700
999864553.transcript: It's my job to fly into the front lines!

999991411.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
999991411.transcript: Ugh! They just keep popping up outta nowhere!

1004352092.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
1004352092.transcript: Yeah... The Six Dragons mean business.

1010529415.label: PL2600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
1010529415.transcript: She reminds me of Sergeant Elsa.

1011343400.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
1011343400.transcript: That magic bow is so sweet!

1014418243.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
1014418243.transcript: Break this and down comes the big guy, yeah!

1023063961.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
1023063961.transcript: We should name that attack! Any ideas?

1024672314.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
1024672314.transcript: So, I've been meaning to ask... How the heck do you surf on a spear?

1045303812.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1600_2
1045303812.transcript: It wasn't supposed to end up this way!

1046394155.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
1046394155.transcript: Take it from me! Don't get carried away!

1047645009.label: PL2600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
1047645009.transcript: Maybe we should play it safe.

1049338018.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
1049338018.transcript: I know, I know! Focus B! Focus!

1049825460.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_buff_D_PL1600
1049825460.transcript: You always make the right play!

1051470522.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
1051470522.transcript: You've got my full support, Rolan!

1056248020.label: PL2600_vo_DUO_buff_C_PL2700
1056248020.transcript: Get a load of this, Eustace!

1062497212.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
1062497212.transcript: The real Fureikin didn't seem this weird!

1073591904.label: PL2600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
1073591904.transcript: What the heck? Those bullets came outta nowhere!
